spec_match.rationale: Uses toggle event on each nested dialog to maintain a live open-stack — exactly the kind of state tracking the new event enables.

interactive.rationale: Open settings → confirm → help chain; stack visualization updates as events fire.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises nested chain with live stack rebuild; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show what happens when a parent dialog closes while children are open (cascade). Doesn't show event ordering when multiple dialogs close simultaneously.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, nested dialogs use --bg-paper / --border-black appropriately.

openQuestions.title: Show cascading close behaviour
openQuestions.detail: When the user closes the root dialog while children are open, what's the event order? Capture and display this in the stack visualizer.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate top-layer interaction
openQuestions.detail: Nested modal dialogs stack in the top layer. Add a visual representation of the top-layer order so the visitor sees why the stack matters.

summary: Strong nested-dialog stack demo with live event-driven state. Could probe cascade closing and top-layer ordering.
